news.headline: REUTERS POLL-EUROPEAN CENTRAL BANK TO CUT DEPOSIT RATE TO 2.00% ON JUNE 5, SAY ALL 81 ECONOMISTS  EUROPEAN CENTRAL BANK TO PAUSE IN JULY, SAY 71% OF ECONOMISTS, 51 OF 72 (68%, OR 45 OF 66 IN APRIL POLL) REUTERS POLL-NO MAJORITY AMONG ECONOMISTS FOR TIMING OF NEXT ECB DEPOSIT
Poll: No majority among economists for timing of next ECB deposit rate cut after June, but at least one more expected
European Central Bank to pause in July, say 71% of economists, 51 of 72 vs 68%, or 45 of 66 in April poll - Poll.
Poll: ECB to cut deposit rate to 2.00% on June 5th - all 81 economists
Poll: Eurozone economy to grow 0.9% and 1.1% in 2025 and 2026 (0.8% and 1.2% in April poll)

news.summary: A well-known commercial real estate developer and manager, Diamond Properties, has been honored by the Building Owners and Managers Association (BOMA) of Westchester. The induction into BOMA's Hall of Honor took place during the company's 30th anniversary year. The prestigious award was bestowed at the association's 33rd Annual Hall of Honor Awards Dinner on May 15 at Abigail Kirsch at Tappan Hill in Tarrytown, NY, commemorating Diamond Properties' remarkable thirty years of notable achievements.
news.headline: Diamond Properties inducted into BOMA Westchester Hall of Honor during their 30th anniversary. Celebrated at 33rd Annual Hall of Honor Awards Dinner.

news.summary: Phoenix Financial Ltd., an Israeli insurance and asset management company, reported Q1/2025 results with comprehensive income of NIS 568 million and core income of NIS 626 million, showing a 15% increase from last year. Asset Management income rose by 43% to NIS 204 million. The company switched to quarterly dividends, declaring NIS 230 million. It implemented IFRS 17 and IFRS 9 in 2025, impacting positive results. Strategic targets for 2027 have been updated to possibly earn an additional NIS 400-600 million. The company's diversified growth strategies led to increased cash flows, and Asset Management and Insurance segments showed significant growth, with adjusted EBITDA increasing by 30%. For detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Phoenix Financial Ltd reported Q1/2025 income at NIS 568M, EPS at NIS 2.26 & 21.3% ROE. Asset Management income grew 43% to NIS 204M. Dividend policy updated to quarterly with NIS 230M dividend declared. Implementing IFRS 17 & IFRS 9, targeting additional NIS 400-600M income for 2027.

news.summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global protection company specializing in safeguarding connected devices, homes, and automobiles, has revealed a new partnership. The company has joined forces with Ciocca Automotive, a rapidly expanding automotive group owning 54 dealerships across New Jersey and Pennsylvania. As a result of this collaboration, Ciocca Automotive will now provide various Assurant vehicle protection products to its customers, aiming to ensure the safety of both new and used vehicles.
news.headline: Assurant partners with Ciocca Automotive to offer vehicle protection products in 54 dealerships across NJ and PA. $AIZ.

news.summary: A report on the Data Center Dielectric Fluid Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting significant growth from $178.30 million in 2024 to an estimated $2.50 billion by 2034, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 30.27%. This surge is attributed to the rising demand for energy solutions.
news.headline: Data Center Dielectric Fluid Market to reach $2.50 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 30.27%. Increased demand for energy efficiency.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on May 29, 2025, a global shipping company, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $3.0 million with a net income attributed to common stockholders of $1.6 million in this quarter. This marks an improvement from the first quarter of 2024, where they had a net income of $2.1 million and net income attributed to common stockholders of $0.6 million. The earnings per share for the first quarter of 2025 stood at $0.01 basic and diluted, mirroring the figures reported for the same quarter in 2024.
news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. earns $3.0M in net income for Q1 2025, declares $0.01 cash dividend per common share.

news.summary: Homeowners in stable housing markets are encountering unforeseen obstacles amidst low inventory levels. Despite favorable locations, they are experiencing diminishing property values and struggles to sell due to challenges related to insurance availability and cost. Cotality™, a prominent global provider of property information and analytics, recently released its 2025 Hurricane Risk Report. This report, compiled by Cotality experts, delves into the increasing financial uncertainties posed by hurricanes.
news.headline: Cotality report shows unexpected challenges in stable markets due to hurricane risks affecting property values and sales.

news.summary: Vantage Data Centers, a top provider of hyperscale data center campuses worldwide, has appointed Ophir Rahmani as the new Chief Operating Officer for North America. In his position, Rahmani will oversee operations for the company’s growing number of cloud and AI data centers in the US and Canada, focusing on technical solutions, reliability, and customer satisfaction. Rahmani will work from the company’s headquarters to lead teams in enhancing services for their expanding fleet.
news.headline: Vantage Data Centers appoints Ophir Rahmani as COO for North America to oversee operations in US and Canada.

news.summary: In Houston and San Francisco, Booli, known for creating the first Identity-Centric SIEM globally, made significant announcements today. Joe Schorr was appointed as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Nachi Periakaruppan as Chief Product Officer (CPO. These new additions to Booli's leadership team are set to boost its growth further, as more enterprises and MSSPs around the world adopt its identity-first approach to combat advanced threats. This move comes as Booli continues to make waves in the industry, with a strong emphasis on identity security, as seen in the increasing number of users joining the platform.
news.headline: Booli appoints Joe Schorr as Chief Revenue Officer and Nachi Periakaruppan as Chief Product Officer, strengthening its leadership team.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Grammarly, an AI assistant for communication and productivity, revealed a significant development today. The company secured a noteworthy $1 billion in funding from General Catalyst, highlighting the firm's ongoing dedication to Grammarly. Since acquiring Coda in January 2025, Grammarly has transitioned into an AI productivity platform for various applications and agents. The investment, sourced from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF), will primarily support Grammarly in expanding its sales and marketing efforts.
news.headline: Grammarly secures $1 billion financing from General Catalyst to expand its AI productivity platform, post acquisition of Coda.

news.summary: A company based in New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR), has revealed the newest addition to its leadership team. Mannix Aklian has been appointed as the executive vice president and chief commercial officer. With over 25 years in software sales and leadership in biopharmaceutical and technology sectors, he will now lead the global software sales and marketing division. Aklian will supervise Schrödinger’s account management teams worldwide and be accountable for...
news.headline: Schrödinger appoints Mannix Aklian as CCO, Global Head of Software Sales & Marketing; brings 25 years of experience.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to be conducted by Cognyte in Herzliya, Israel on June 11, 2025, at 8:30 am Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to discuss the financial results of Q1 FY2026, covering the period up to April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Cognyte will reveal their Q1 FY2026 results on June 11, 2025. Conference call at 8:30am ET to discuss performance.

news.summary: Cotiviti GOV Services, LLC, based in Salt Lake City, has been appointed by CMS as the designated Recovery Audit Contractor (RAC) for Region 3, Region 4, and Region 5. This designation solidifies their role in auditing and identifying improper Medicare payments in these regions, which cover a significant number of healthcare providers and beneficiaries. This move comes as part of CMS's ongoing efforts to ensure the integrity of the Medicare program.
news.headline: Cotiviti GOV secures contracts as CMS Recovery Audit Contractor for Regions 3, 4, and 5, announced by CMS.

news.summary: In Atlanta today, FINEOS Corporation (ASX:FCL) revealed that Medavie Blue Cross has initiated the management of Individual Life and Disability Claims on their current FINEOS Platform. Medavie Blue Cross, a major benefits provider in health, drug, and disability insurance, aims to enhance operational efficiency and customer service by consolidating Individual Life and Group Life & Disability claims on a unified platform. This move is expected to streamline processes and ensure a more customer-centric approach.
news.headline: Medavie Blue Cross modernizes disability business using FINEOS Platform, handling claims on unified platform for operational efficiency.

news.summary: Taktile, a prominent provider of decision automation software for banks and fintech companies, was recently acknowledged as a member of the World Economic Forum’s Global Innovators Community. This exclusive group comprises the most promising technology leaders globally. The recognition highlights Taktile's position as a trailblazer in AI-powered software for financial institutions and its dedication to developing inclusive, resilient, and sustainable systems. Taktile's platform continues to make strides in revolutionizing the financial sector.
news.headline: Taktile chosen as Global Innovator by World Economic Forum for financial decision-making, part of elite tech group.

news.summary: A collaboration between NTT Solmare Corporation, CREEK & RIVER Co., Ltd., and flaggs Inc. has led to the development of a new Obey Me! app in Osaka, Japan. This announcement was made by NTT Solmare Corporation and highlights the exciting partnership between the three companies to create a unique app experience for users.
news.headline: New Obey Me! app announced by NTT Solmare Corp, developed with CREEK & RIVER Co., Ltd and flaggs Inc. Launch on Kickstarter & Soreosu, Osaka, Japan

news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report from Redfin revealed a significant disparity in the U.S. housing market. There are approximately 1.9 million home sellers compared to around 1.5 million homebuyers. This means there is a 33.7% surplus of sellers, equating to 490,041 more sellers than buyers. This imbalance is unprecedented since 2013, marking a historic high where sellers significantly outnumber buyers. A year ago, sellers were also in the majority.
news.headline: Record 490,041 more US home sellers than buyers, leading to potential price drops; 33.7% more sellers.

news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, Kopin Corporation (NASDAQ: KOPN) disclosed the retirement of Rich Sneider, a key figure within the company. Rich's departure prompts Kopin to actively seek a replacement, with considerations for potential candidates from within the company as well as externally. Michael Murray, the Chairman and CEO of Kopin, acknowledged Rich's significant contributions and leadership. Kopin Corporation is known for providing specialized optical systems and high-performance microdisplays for various sectors including defense, training, enterprise, industrial, consumer, and medical products. The search for Rich Sneider's successor marks a pivotal moment for the corporation.
news.headline: Kopin CFO Rich Sneider retires, search for replacement underway. Company considering internal/external candidates.

news.summary: Fairway Capital Management announced that their Fairway Private Equity & Venture Capital Opportunities Fund saw a 1.64% increase in Net Asset Value for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. Over the one, two, and three-year periods up to the same date, the Fund delivered returns of 8.00%, 11.38%, and 7.25% respectively. Since its inception on December 29, 2021, the Fund has achieved an annualized return of 6.34%. In comparison, the S&P 500 index had returns of -4.27%, 8.25%, 18.57% over the same time periods.
news.headline: Fairway Private Equity & VC Fund sees 1.64% NAV increase in Q1 2025; 8.00%, 11.38%, 7.25% returns in 1, 2, 3 yr; S&P 500 -4.27%, 8.25%, 18.57% respectively.

news.summary: Pavilion Payments, a top omnichannel payment solutions provider in the gaming sector, has named Brock Moorehouse as the new Vice President of Customer Success. With more than 17 years of experience in the gaming industry, Moorehouse started his career in 2008 at Downstream Casino Resort in Quapaw, Oklahoma. Progressing from cage operations to the role of Director of Compliance, he gained valuable insights into casino operations and a strong focus on customer satisfaction.
news.headline: Pavilion Payments names Brock Moorehouse VP of Customer Success, with 17 years experience in gaming industry.

news.summary: In Chicago, CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. revealed it has been chosen by BMW of North America to improve post-collision services for drivers. This partnership will integrate CCC technology into BMW's digital platform, streamlining the process for U.S. drivers to locate authorized repair centers, request photo estimates, and receive preliminary repair cost information. This move aims to enhance the overall post-collision experience for BMW drivers, showcasing the company's commitment to customer service and technological advancement in the P&C insurance sector.
news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions is selected by BMW to improve post-collision experience for drivers, making it easier to connect with certified repair centers.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, according to a recent study by J.D. Power, engagement with electric vehicle (EV) apps has surged to record levels. However, EV brands are under increasing pressure to enhance the speed and reliability of these applications. The study highlights a growing demand for EV-related technologies, with users seeking improved performance and stability from these apps. This trend underscores the need for brands to prioritize enhancing the overall user experience to meet consumer expectations.
news.headline: EV app engagement at new highs, brands urged to boost speed, reliability: J.D. Power.
